prestazioni: ECU remap via MHD Flasher targeting the N57D30O1 (3.0L inline-6 diesel) with Stage 2+ aggressive fueling, raising peak torque to 750Nm at 2,200 RPM and power to 380HP via custom dyno-tuned maps optimized for Garrett GTB2260VK turbocharger efficiency

Full turbo system upgrade to Garrett GTB2260VK with billet compressor wheel, 64mm turbine housing, and BorgWarner EFR wastegate actuator, paired with custom 3.5" downpipe and Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converters for minimal backpressure

High-pressure fuel system overhaul featuring Bosch CP4.2 2200-bar injection pump, Siemens 2000-bar piezo injectors (PN: 0445110370), and custom fuel rail with -10AN braided lines, supported by a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup for crankcase ventilation
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (8 Series-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and extended rocker panels, paired with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and OEM+ gloss black kidney grilles

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (BMW 8 Series G16-specific valving) with 20-way adjustable damping, Swift Springs (8K front/10K rear), and custom top mounts for camber adjustment up to -3.5 degrees, complemented by M Performance carbon fiber front strut bar

Custom 22" Vossen HF-5T wheels in staggered fitment (9.5" ET30 front, 12" ET40 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/25 rear), paired with AP Racing 400mm front brake kit (6-piston calipers) and Pagid RSL29 brake pads
